projects.title: Beach Ball
projects.description: A classic round beach ball. Practice committing to a clean circle and using curves to suggest a sphere instead of a flat disc.

projects.title: Apple
projects.description: An apple with a stem and a single leaf. A friendly intro to organic, slightly asymmetric shapes.

projects.title: Mug
projects.description: A simple ceramic mug. Introduces straight verticals, ellipses, and the handle as a partial circle.

projects.title: Leaf
projects.description: A single leaf with a central vein and a few branching side veins. Practice symmetry around an axis.

projects.title: Perched Bird
projects.description: A small songbird sitting on a branch. Practice combining a head and body and finding the right proportion between them.

projects.title: Turtle
projects.description: A turtle in profile with shell, limbs, and head extended. Practice blocking the shell first and fitting the body to it.

projects.title: Sitting Cat
projects.description: A cat sitting upright facing forward. Practice gesture and silhouette before any details.

projects.title: Mushroom Cluster
projects.description: Three mushrooms of different sizes, overlapping. Practice composition and using overlap to create depth.

projects.title: Cottage Front
projects.description: A small cottage seen from the front. Practice clean straight lines and balancing structural geometry with cozy detail.

projects.title: Full Tree
projects.description: A full tree with trunk, branches, and a foliage silhouette. Practice organic branching and varying line weight.
